headline.purpose: Top-level section headings on dedicated pages.

title.purpose: Article / service titles inside a section.

body.purpose: Reading text. Fixed size — never clamps with viewport.

label.purpose: The .label-meta and .section-label voice — kickers, role labels, dl labels.

mono.purpose: Metadata only — years, role tags, stack, kbd, code, the § marker. Never body or headline.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and the scroll-reveal.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Reserved for the rare emphasized entrance.

motion.name: scroll-reveal-duration
motion.purpose: One-shot fade + 14px rise as each section enters viewport.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single saturated UI element on most viewports. Solid accent on background-color, page-bg on text. Used for the hero CTA and contact submit.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'General Sans Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.005em; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; min-height: 44px; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary { color: oklch(98.5% 0.004 248); background: oklch(34% 0.12 248); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.12 248); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(27% 0.12 248); border-color: oklch(27% 0.12 248); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(34% 0.12 248); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Transparent button with stroked border. Used alongside primary CTA for the lower-friction option (e.g. 'View work').
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'General Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(18% 0.015 248); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(78% 0.010 248); border-radius: 3px; min-height: 44px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 140ms, color 140ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(34% 0.12 248); color: oklch(34% 0.12 248); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(34% 0.12 248); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The recurring editorial signature. Small-caps heading prefixed with a § glyph in the accent color. Used at the top of every section.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: inline-block; font-family: 'General Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-caps: all-small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: oklch(50% 0.012 248); margin: 0 0 1.5rem 0; } .ds-section-label::before { content: '§\00a0 '; color: oklch(34% 0.12 248); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Availability Pill
components.description: Calm-signal element used in hero meta panel and footer. Communicates booking availability without sales-push framing.
components.html: Verfügbar ab Juni 2026
components.css: .ds-availability { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'General Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-caps: all-small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: oklch(18% 0.015 248); } .ds-availability-dot { display: inline-block; width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(34% 0.12 248); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Service Entry
components.description: Numbered editorial entry — the Services section's distinctive pattern. Leading mono numeral with a horizontal rule, kicker, title, description, price callout, and included/excluded lists. Specifically not bordered or boxed.
components.html:
01

Website-Redesign

Eine Landingpage, die wirklich verkauft

Fixpreis ab €500. Inkl. Briefing, Design, Entwicklung und Launch.
components.css: .ds-service { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; } .ds-service-index { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Commit Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(50% 0.012 248); margin: 0; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; } .ds-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: oklch(92% 0.006 248); } .ds-service-kicker { font-family: 'General Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-caps: all-small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: oklch(50% 0.012 248); margin: 0; } .ds-service-title { font-family: 'General Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: oklch(18% 0.015 248); margin: 0; } .ds-service-desc { font-family: 'General Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(18% 0.015 248); margin: 0; max-width: 38rem; }

components.name: Editorial Link
components.description: Inline link treatment. Underline tinted at 25% accent, never the full color. The underline goes full-contrast on hover.
components.html: Mehr dazu in der Case Study zu Vordermann.
components.css: .ds-link { color: oklch(34% 0.12 248); text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(34% 0.12 248) 25%, transparent); text-underline-offset: 0.18em; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; transition: color 140ms, text-decoration-color 140ms; } .ds-link:hover { color: oklch(27% 0.12 248); text-decoration-color: currentColor; } .ds-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(34% 0.12 248); outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 3px; }

narrative.northStar: An engineer's notebook crossed with a Viennese craftsman's business card.
narrative.overview: A self-hosted personal site for an Austrian freelance developer whose primary offer is recurring hosting & care for small-business landing pages. Every choice must read as calm, precise, trustworthy — the visual layer of an engagement that's meant to last years, not a one-night project. European editorial sensibility, not Silicon-Valley dev-portfolio. The page rewards skim readers and survives a peer's close inspection. The system rejects three nearby aesthetic families: agency-flashy, corporate consultancy bland, and generic dev portfolio. The Geist + Geist Mono pairing was specifically rejected for becoming the AI-template default; General Sans Variable + Commit Mono carries the same precision with European warmth.
keyCharacteristics: Typographic-first — hierarchy is type weight, size, tracking, and mono treatment, almost never color or shadow.
Asymmetric where content earns it; centering is the safe default rejected on purpose.
Three named section-rhythm modes (default / continued / pause).
Metadata-as-craft — small mono labels signal 'labelled by someone who notices details.'
Both themes deliberately tuned; dark is not an inverse of light.
Recurring-relationship voice — Hosting & Care leads; one-shot project is the entry point.

rules.name: The Ink-Blue Rule
rules.body: The accent appears on ≤10% of any given viewport. Its rarity is the signal. Every additional use weakens the previous one.

rules.name: The No-Pure Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward 248° at chroma 0.004–0.015. Pure black or pure white is a bug.

rules.name: The Selection Rule
rules.body: ::selection inverts to the accent. Tiny detail, deliberate.

rules.name: The Mono-as-Metadata Rule
rules.body: Mono never carries body copy or headlines. It carries metadata: project years, role labels, stack tags, kbd, code, the § marker.

rules.name: The Section-Marker Rule
rules.body: section-label always prefixes with § in the accent color. The page's recurring editorial signature.

rules.name: The Tracking-by-Size Rule
rules.body: Heading tracking forms a graded scale tighter as size grows. Do not tweak per-instance.

rules.name: The Balance + Pretty Rule
rules.body: Headings use text-wrap: balance. Body and list items use text-wrap: pretty.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Box-shadow is forbidden as a decorative or hierarchical signal. Depth is tonal layering plus 1px rules.

rules.name: The Section-Rhythm Rule
rules.body: Three modes — default 6rem, continued 3rem, pause 8rem. Every section picks one; exceptions carry a comment naming the reason.

dos: Do use OKLCH for every color. Hex is forbidden in the source.
Do carry one ink-blue hue (248°) across accent + every neutral.
Do let typography carry the design before reaching for color, gradient, or shadow.
Do label every section with the § small-caps section-label pattern.
Do break the grid intentionally in one or two places per page; don't break it everywhere.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings, text-wrap: pretty on body and lists.
Do use tabular figures (tnum) wherever mono touches numerics.
Do keep the page-load orchestration restrained — one stagger sequence, ~400–600ms, ease-out-quart.
Do use --color-rule (the lightest border) for section dividers.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text. Solid colors only, ever.
Don't introduce glassmorphism, glow, neon, or animated gradient.
Don't place an icon above every heading.
Don't build card grids of icon + heading + text.
Don't write a hero subtitle that restates the headline.
Don't use modals where a dedicated page or inline disclosure would do.
Don't use em dashes in any new UI copy.
Don't add a 'trusted by' logo wall or friend-network testimonials.
Don't scroll-jack, parallax, or animate on scroll progress beyond the existing one-shot fade-in.
Don't transition layout properties. Only transform and opacity.
Don't introduce a third font. Two families is the ceiling.
